title: I Can’t Believe They Invented It!
description: Troy McClure speaks with the inventors of products you could only imagine before, like The Foam Dome, The Jetwalker, Mr. Sugarcube, Spiffy, and more.
alt1: woman pouring a bag of sugar into a Mr. Sugarcube machine
alt2: guy wearing Foam Dome hat with that holds two beers and drinks them through bending straws
alt4: McClure with Dr. Nick Riviera, inventor of Spiffy
